# Saeed Saqib

Pakistani. Software engineer based in Dubai. Self-taught since 16, shipping since 2016.

Founder of [Irixsoft](https://irixsoft.com). I build developer tools and agentic SaaS products. You might know me for [Wazen](https://wazen.dev), a WhatsApp API for developers.

No CS degree. Just products in production and code that runs in the real world.

---

### What I'm shipping

[![Wazen](https://img.shields.io/badge/Wazen-WhatsApp%20API-25D366?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)](https://wazen.dev)
[![Irixsoft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Irixsoft-Software%20Company-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white)](https://irixsoft.com)

- **[Wazen](https://wazen.dev)** -- WhatsApp API for developers. Send and receive messages with a simple REST API. Node.js, Python, and C# SDKs.
- **Rihlax** -- Transport management for UAE (on hold)

---
